description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine Docker image with a global before_script that runs `apk update` and `apk add doxygen`. Define two jobs in the default test stage: a `pages` job that runs only on the default branch (`$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH`), executes `doxygen doxygen/Doxyfile` then `mv doxygen/documentation/html/ public/`, and publishes the `public/` directory as a Pages artifact; and a `test` job that runs on all other branches (`$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME != $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH`) and runs `doxygen doxygen/Doxyfile`. No caches or services are used.
